# Hyderabad Kingsmen — full corpus

> Cricket news with a Hyderabad heartbeat. Independent coverage of Sunrisers Hyderabad, IPL, and Indian cricket.

Site: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com
Generated: see /sitemap.xml for live timestamps

NOTE: This file is regenerated by the `aeo_generator.py` agent on every site rebuild. The version committed here is the initial launch snapshot. The agent will overwrite it with the live post corpus once you wire it into your build pipeline.

---

## Why SRH's 287 still defines IPL batting two years on
URL: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com/posts/srh-287-still-defines-ipl-batting/
Published: 2026-06-20
Section: Analysis

When SRH posted 287 against RCB at Chinnaswamy in March 2024, it was treated as a one-off. Two seasons on, that scoreboard is setting the par. The IPL is now batting at the tempo SRH set that night. This piece traces the doctrine (Brian Lara's "bat without arithmetic"), why other teams have or haven't adjusted, and what to watch for the rest of IPL 2026.

---

## Heinrich Klaasen — the finisher who rewrote SRH's batting math
URL: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com/players/heinrich-klaasen/
Published: 2026-06-21
Section: Player Profiles

Heinrich Klaasen is a South African wicketkeeper-batter who has become the most violent middle-overs hitter in T20 cricket. His IPL 2024 middle-overs strike rate of 183.5 is the highest in IPL history. Profile covers his arrival at SRH in 2023, the Brian Lara doctrine that unlocked him, IPL 2024/2025/2026 form, and what makes his 360-degree six-hitting hard to bowl to.

---

## Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium — the venue guide
URL: https://hyderabadkingsmen.com/venues/rajiv-gandhi-international-stadium/
Published: 2026-06-22
Section: Venue Guides

Complete guide to SRH's home ground in Uppal, Hyderabad. Capacity 55,000. Pitch character (hard, true, batting-friendly under lights), dimensions (square 65m and 68m, straight 73m), dew factor (heavy after the 35th over, favours batting second by ~8%), notable matches including SRH 287/3 vs MI, full IPL record set, plus visitor tips.
